diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,124 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main entry point for the Hono application class with default SmartRouter combining RegExpRouter and TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Extends HonoBase with configurable router options, defaults to SmartRouter for optimal performance across various routing scenarios
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base implementation containing core request handling, middleware support, and routing infrastructure
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use, router, compose, Context, getPath, mergePath, UnsupportedPathError, Router, RouterRoute, MiddlewareHandler, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, FetchEventLike, EXECUTION_CONTEXT
+- Simple note: Implements the request/response lifecycle with method handlers, middleware chaining via composition, and supports multiple routing strategies through injectable Router implementations
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index to export PatternRouter from the router implementation
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports PatternRouter from router.ts as a singleton router module
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements path matching using constructed JavaScript RegExp patterns
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, UnsupportedPathError, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Param, Params, Result, Router
+- Simple note: Converts path strings into compiled RegExp patterns during add(), uses exec() for matching during match() with support for named capturing groups and parameter extraction
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index to export LinearRouter from the router implementation
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports LinearRouter from router.ts which performs linear iteration through registered routes
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Sequentially iterates through a linear list of routes to find matches
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, UnsupportedPathError, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Params, Result, Router, emptyParams, splitPathRe, buildWildcardRegExpCache
+- Simple note: Single-pass O(n) matching that supports static and dynamic routes but fails with complex param patterns including nested wildcards due to linear search order
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index exporting RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, MatcherMap
+- Simple note: Exports pre-built router and serialization utilities for serverless environments and router hot-swapping
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Provides core matching logic for RegExpRouter returning results with parameter index mappings
+- Names noticed: matcher, match, emptyParam, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, ParamIndexMap, ParamStash
+- Simple note: First tries exact static path match, then uses compiled RegExp, returns matched handlers with param index map for efficient multi-match resolution
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Pre-compiles and stores matchers for zero-overhead request handling
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, MatcherMap, match, emptyParam, ParamIndexMap, StaticMap, HandlerData
+- Simple note: Captures all paths at construction time into optimized handler lookups for maximum throughput with no per-request processing cost
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Implements Trie node for building the pattern expression tree
+- Names noticed: Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, PATH_ERROR, compareKey, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, regExpMetaChars
+- Simple note: Recursive tree structure organizing routes, handles param capture, wildcards, and label patterns with proper regex constraint validation
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Implements Trie data structure for inserting paths and building the final compiled regex
+- Names noticed: Trie, ParamAssocArray, Node, Context, ReplacementMap, group, mark
+- Simple note: Processes tokens to build expression tree then converts to single combined regex with index and param substitution maps
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Core RegExpRouter class that accepts routes during add() and compiles them for fast matching
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, match, UnsupportedPathError, buildAllMatchers, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, PATH_ERROR, buildWildcardRegExpCache, findMiddleware, HandlerWithMetadata, Route
+- Simple note: Two-phase router: adds routes incrementally in memory, builds matcher on first match() call to prevent duplicate additions, then serves all future requests from compiled matcher
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index to export SmartRouter from the router implementation
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports SmartRouter as a hybrid router capable of adapting its strategy based on registered routes
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Hybrids multiple router implementations adaptively during runtime
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT
+- Simple note: Routes registrations to appropriate sub-romoters; on first match() switches to best-fit router and delegates all future matches to it for performance
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index to export TrieRouter from the router implementation
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports TrieRouter from router.ts for tree-based path matching
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: High-performance tree router with queue-based search and parameter binding
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, Params, Result, Router
+- Simple note: Maintains node tree and traverses with BFS queue during search, resolves param collisions by comparing score values and propagating bound params down the tree
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class representing tree elements with method handlers and children
+- Names noti
